params.name: Jin Hou Bird Zun
params.description: The Jin Hou Bird Zun is a very precious artifact among Chinese Shang and Zhou dynasty bronzes. It has a unique shape, resembling a phoenix bird, with its head held high, eyes wide open, beak slightly open, and tail feathers elegantly arched into a beautiful curve. The tail is cleverly designed into an elephant trunk-shaped spout, making the entire vessel both aesthetically pleasing and practical. It is not only a work of art but also an important historical artifact, reflecting the high achievem …
